VialSamplerPretreatment.ConfigurationXml: <VialSamplerConfig xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xsdName="VialSamplerConfig.xsd" schemaVersion="1.0.0" schemaSI="2"><DisplayName>Sampler</DisplayName><SerialNumber>DEAEQ03893</SerialNumber><ModuleType>G7129A</ModuleType><ModuleDisplayType>G7129A</ModuleDisplayType><ConnectionInfo><ConnectionType>ConnectionType_IPAddress</ConnectionType><IPAddress>192.168.254.11</IPAddress></ConnectionInfo><LANConfig>IsCAP</LANConfig><FirmwareRevision>D.07.39 [0003]</FirmwareRevision><IsCoolerInstalled>false</IsCoolerInstalled><IsExternalTrayInstalled>false</IsExternalTrayInstalled><Syringe><ID>G7129-60082</ID><DisplayName>100 µL Analytical Head</DisplayName><InjectionVolume>100</InjectionVolume><Diameter>3.175</Diameter></Syringe><SeatCapillary><ID>G7129-87017</ID><DisplayName>Seat assembly PEEK 0.17 mm</DisplayName><InjectionVolume>0</InjectionVolume><PhysicalVolume>2.7</PhysicalVolume></SeatCapillary><LoopCapillary><ID>G7129-60500</ID><DisplayName>Sample Loop 100 µL</DisplayName><InjectionVolume>100</InjectionVolume><PhysicalVolume>200</PhysicalVolume></LoopCapillary></VialSamplerConfig>
